title: [F] Export some cells of Excel as pictures, keep the Excel style,
author: zhangbowy
body:
## 🚀 Feature Proposal

Export some cells of Excel as pictures, keep the Excel style, just like Office Excel, right click to copy

将excel部分单元格导出为图片, 保留excel的样式，就像offce的excel，右键复制一样。

## Motivation
I want to export some cells as images

我想将部分单元格导出为图片

```
// return image
workbook.toImage("A1:C15")
```

## Example
For example, this part of excel

例如excel这部分
![1.jpg](https://fotor-pri-test.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/temp/origin/1df5d2e8df52427dbd4ed1427417ec6f.jpg)

Export as image to keep the original style

导出为 图片保留原样式
